title: Disabled source from “Add file” on a board
excerpt:
Hello, 
Give the option to disable some source from the “add files” on a board.

posts.author: donnet.t (Théo Donnet)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

Give the option to disable some source from the “add files” on a board.

The reason behind my request is that files need to come only from corporate source.
User shouldn’t be allowed to connect their personnal cloud storage to upload a document.

Regards,
Théo
